basic_details.organization_name: College of Food Technology, Central Agricultural University (CAU), Imphal
basic_details.short_information: College of Food Technology, Central Agricultural University (CAU) has published the Project Assistant Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 01 Project Assistant position. Candidates within the age limit as per Government of India norms and holding a Graduate degree in Food Technology, Food Engineering & Technology, Food Process Engineering, or Agricultural Engineering (First Class) are eligible to attend the walk-in interview at https://cau.ac.in/. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 22-07-2026 (reporting at 09:00 AM), and candidates can easily access the notification PDF an

qualification.details: Essential Qualification: Graduate in Food Technology / Food Engineering and Technology / Food Process Engineering / Agricultural Engineering with first class from a recognized university/institute. | Desirable Qualification: | M.Tech. with Qualified NET/GATE. Prior research experience/knowledge in the field of Machine Design. | Age Limit: As per Govt. of India norms (relaxation as applicable).

how_to_apply: Candidates must appear for Walk-in Interview on the scheduled date.
Prepare a written/typed application in the prescribed format.
Bring original certificates, mark sheets, and other relevant documents along with self-attested photocopies.
Report at the Conference Hall, College of Food Technology, CAU, Lamphelpat-795004 on 22 July 2026 at 09:00 AM.
Candidates already in service must submit application through proper channel and produce No Objection Certificate at the time of interview.
important_instructions: No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. Engagement is purely temporary/contractual and co-terminus with the project. Performance will be reviewed periodically; unsatisfactory performance may lead to termination without notice. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The decision of the University/College will be final and binding.
Venue: Conference Hall, College of Food Technology, CAU, Lamphelpat-795004, Imphal.

content_sections.heading: CAU College of Food Technology Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: College of Food Technology, Central Agricultural University (CAU), Lamphelpat has invited applications for the post of Project Assistant under the ANRF-PMECRG funded project. The notification contains complete details regarding qualification, remuneration, terms & conditions, and walk-in interview schedule. Download CAU College of Food Technology Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CAU College of Food Technology Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Overview

rows.college_of_food_technology_central_agric: Design and development of a continuous two-stage frying system for the production of healthy savoury snacks in the food industries

content_sections.heading: CAU College of Food Technology Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
CAU College of Food Technology Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential Qualification: Graduate in Food Technology / Food Engineering and Technology / Food Process Engineering / Agricultural Engineering with first class from a recognized university/institute. Desirable Qualification: M.Tech. with Qualified NET/GATE. Prior research experience/knowledge in the field of Machine Design. Age Limit: As per Govt. of India norms (relaxation as applicable).

content_sections.heading: CAU College of Food Technology Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Job Description
content_sections.text: The selected candidate will work on the design and development of a continuous two-stage frying system for healthy savoury snacks.

content_sections.heading: CAU College of Food Technology Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates must appear for Walk-in Interview on the scheduled date. Step-by-Step Process: Prepare a written/typed application in the prescribed format. Attach 2 recent passport-size photographs. Bring original certificates, mark sheets, and other relevant documents along with self-attested photocopies. Report at the Conference Hall, College of Food Technology, CAU, Lamphelpat-795004 on 22 July 2026 at 09:00 AM. Candidates already in service must submit application through proper channel and produce No Objection Certificate at the time of interview.

content_sections.heading: CAU College of Food Technology Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions:
content_sections.text: No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. Engagement is purely temporary/contractual and co-terminus with the project. Performance will be reviewed periodically; unsatisfactory performance may lead to termination without notice. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The decision of the University/College will be final and binding. Venue: Conference Hall, College of Food Technology, CAU, Lamphelpat-795004, Imphal.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for CAU College of Food Technology Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 22 July 2026 (Wednesday).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Assistant at CAU Imphal?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy under the ANRF-PMECRG funded project.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Assistant at College of Food Technology CAU?
faq.answer: Rs. 27,000/- per month + HRA (as per norms).

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for CAU Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Graduate (First Class) in Food Technology / Food Engineering / Food Process Engineering / Agricultural Engineering.

faq.question: Q5. Is M.Tech. mandatory for CAU Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, M.Tech. with NET/GATE is desirable but not essential.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the CAU Project Assistant Walk-in Interview be held?
faq.answer: At the Conference Hall, College of Food Technology, CAU, Lamphelpat-795004, Imphal.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for CAU Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Original certificates, mark sheets, 2 passport-size photos, and self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. Is prior experience required for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: Prior research experience in Machine Design is desirable.

faq.question: Q9. Is the CAU Project Assistant position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary and contractual for 3 years or project duration.

faq.question: Q10. How to apply for CAU College of Food Technology Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: Appear directly for the Walk-in Interview on 22-07-2026 with all required documents.
